query:
-- Check what billing items are assigned to these 11 ChannelHaus services
-- The billing item lineAmount is the actual customer-facing revenue
SELECT 
  s.id as serviceDbId,
  s.planName,
  s.customerName,
  s.monthlyCost as currentCost,
  s.monthlyRevenue as currentRevenue,
  bi.billingItemId,
  bi.description as biDescription,
  bi.lineAmount as biLineAmount,
  bi.unitAmount,
  bi.quantity,
  sba.assignmentType
FROM services s
JOIN service_billing_assignments sba ON sba.serviceId = s.id
JOIN billing_items bi ON bi.id = sba.billingItemId
WHERE s.supplierName = 'ChannelHaus'
  AND s.monthlyCost = s.monthlyRevenue
  AND s.monthlyCost > 0
ORDER BY s.customerName, s.planName;

WHERE s.supplierName = 'ChannelHaus'
  AND s.monthlyCost = s.monthlyRevenue
  AND s.monthlyCost > 0
ORDER BY s.customerName, s.planName;
